title: Interviews with Professionals from Social Services that Support Integration and Employment Services on Trust and Distrust in Encounters with Authorities 2021-2022
description: The data consists of interviews with professionals working in social services supporting integration or employment services, in which they reflect on the development of trust between young immigrants with a refugee background and the authorities. Fourteen of the interviewees were reached in Finland and nine in Sweden.
